duplicates.title: 📋 Duplicate Files Containing PII
duplicates.subtitle: Detection of identical files (same content) containing personal data
duplicates.noScan: No scan available. Start a scan from the Scanner page to detect duplicate files containing PII.
duplicates.riskAlertText: Duplicate files increase the risk of PII exposure. Each copy represents an additional access point. It is recommended to keep only one copy per file and delete duplicates.
duplicates.noDuplicatesText: No copies of files containing PII were found in the scanned directory.

staleness.title: ⏰ File Age (Stale Data)
staleness.noScan: No scan available. Start a scan from the Scanner page.
staleness.subtitle: Analysis of PII files not accessed for a long time - Risk of excessive retention
staleness.legalWarning: Files older than 1 year containing PII must be reviewed for compliance with Benin Law N°2017-20 (APDP - data minimization principle).
staleness.noOldFiles: No old files detected. All files with PII are recent (less than 6 months).

exposure.subtitle: Analysis of Windows permissions and detection of over-exposed files - Risk of unauthorized access
exposure.criticalWarning: Files accessible to "Everyone" represent a critical risk of data breach. Immediately review the permissions of these files.
exposure.noExposed: No over-exposed files detected. All files with PII have appropriate permissions (Low).

faq.q1: How do I start a new scan?
faq.a1: Go to the "New Scan" page from the sidebar, select the directory to analyze, then click "Start scan". Results will appear automatically once the analysis is complete.
faq.a2: PII Scanner analyzes .docx, .xlsx, .pdf, .txt, .log, .csv and .json files. Binary and executable files are ignored.
faq.q3: How do I interpret risk levels?
faq.a3: HIGH: Banking data detected or more than 10 PII. MEDIUM: 3 to 10 PII detected. LOW: 1 to 2 PII detected.
faq.q4: Is my data sent to an external server?
faq.a4: No, all analysis is performed locally on your machine. No data is transmitted externally.
faq.a5: Go to the "Exports" page and choose the desired format: CSV, JSON, HTML or Excel. The report will be downloaded automatically.
faq.q6: Can I back up my database?
faq.a6: Yes, if you are an administrator, go to "Database" and click "Create a backup". You can restore or download backups at any time.
faq.a7: Administrators can create, edit or delete users from the "Users" page.
faq.a8: Yes, PII Scanner works entirely locally. An internet connection is not required to analyze your files.

common.downloadReports: Download reports to see all detections.
